channel.title: Web Security on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Web Security on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Web-to-System Pivot via Command Injection
item.description: Objective: To exploit a Command Injection vulnerability in a web application to bypass input filters and establish a persistent Remote Shell.

item.title: Session Hijacking via Automated Cookie Exfiltration
item.description: Objective: To demonstrate the ease of unauthorized cookie acquisition and subsequent account compromise using browser-based exfiltration tools.

item.title: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) & Path Traversal Discovery
item.description: Objective: To identify and verify directory traversal vulnerabilities that allow unauthorized access to sensitive system files.
